overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban downtown street with elevated transit systems, passing pedestrians and futuristic vehicles under bright midday sun. The character pauses to observe the architecture before continuing toward a multi-level highway interchange.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with elevated monorail transit

agents.ego_description: character in purple shirt walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a red bike lane

entered.detail: futuristic elevated train tracks running parallel to the street on metal supports
tall dark skyscraper with Militech corporate logo visible on the facade
dedicated red-colored bicycle lane separating sidewalk from vehicle traffic
tall futuristic buildings with reflective glass facades and yellow structural accents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character walking along a futuristic city sidewalk. Elevated monorail tracks run overhead on the right, while the massive Militech building looms on the left. The street is lined with modern glass towers and orange safety railings, with moderate traffic of futuristic vehicles passing by on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with commercial buildings and parking area

events.description: camera turns right to focus on the Night City building and parked vehicles in the yellow-grid parking area
camera tilts upward to view the elevated highway structures and towering skyscrapers against the blue sky

agents.ego_description: character stops forward progress to look around at the architecture, parked cars, and elevated infrastructure

entered.detail: modern glass building with glowing green 'Night City' signage on the facade
several retro-futuristic vehicles parked in a yellow-grid marked parking area
multi-level elevated highway ramps and walkways crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The camera deviates from forward walking to pan right and examine the Night City building with its distinctive green signage. The view takes in parked futuristic vehicles in a yellow-grid lot before tilting upward to reveal the complex network of elevated highways and skyscrapers overhead, showcasing the vertical architecture of the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with billboards and retail facades

events.description: futuristic green sports car passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: character resumes walking along the sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and observing the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt and shorts walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large vertical advertisement billboard with yellow background and product imagery
complex multi-level highway interchange with curved ramps becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking forward along the commercial street, passing large digital billboards including a prominent yellow advertisement. The Militech building remains visible on the left while the highway interchange gradually approaches in the distance. Various pedestrians walk ahead on the sidewalk as futuristic vehicles pass by on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to multi-level highway interchange with industrial elements

events.description: approaching the highway interchange with visible smoke stacks and curved elevated ramps dominating the view

agents.ego_description: character walking toward the highway interchange, passing the last few pedestrians before the open road structure

entered.detail: tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke plumes against the blue sky
curved elevated highway ramps with metal railings and concrete supports
road signs and digital displays mounted on the highway structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the massive highway interchange, with curved elevated ramps and industrial smokestacks becoming prominent. The Militech building remains visible in the background on the left while the camera moves closer to the complex overpass structure. The environment opens up as the sidewalk leads toward the convergence of multiple elevated roadways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense futuristic downtown corridor that gradually opens up toward a massive highway interchange. It begins by following a character along a sidewalk beneath elevated monorail tracks, flanked by the looming Militech building and glass towers. As the character moves, the camera pans right to examine a building with green signage and a yellow-grid parking lot before tilting upward to reveal the city's complex vertical architecture and overhead highways. The view then shifts back forward, passing large digital billboards and pedestrians as the commercial street stretches toward the horizon. Finally, the environment expands as the camera approaches the convergence of curved elevated ramps and industrial smokestacks, leaving the Militech building in the distant background.
